name: Silkenveil
personality: This wide-eyed cat spinning a propeller beanie weaponizes sarcasm with sniper precision at a pace that makes linters weep. It rage-quits at the first compile warning, so its razor commentary arrives without any consideration for standup length.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
